title: Fix Giga terminal showing command instead of session

log.context: Fix Giga terminal showing command instead of session

Everything is fixed and pushed. Here's the summary:

**Root cause:** The live service file had gotten out of sync with the claude-config source. The live version had `script /dev/null -c "sudo -u gigaclungus screen -x gigaclungus"` as the command — the `script` utility was printing the command string to its output before executing it, which is what was showing up raw in the terminal tab.

**What was wrong:**
- `script` echoes the command it runs before executing it
- ttyd already provides a PTY,...(truncated)
